basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Jodhpur Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Project Technical Support, Project Nurse Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Jodhpur (AIIMS Jodhpur)
basic_details.post_name: Project Technical Support – III / Project Nurse -II
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Jodhpur (AIIMS Jodhpur) Project Technical Support – III / Project Nurse -II Notification 2026 has been released on 04 May 2026 on the official website of AIIMS Jodhpur. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support – III / Project Nurse -II Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years for all posts. Age concession to the extent of service rendered in other research projects may be admissible for experienced and skilled persons on case to case basis.

qualification.education_qualification: Three-year graduate degree in relevant subject/field + three years experience or PG, Three-year General Nursing & Midwife (GNM) Course
qualification.details: Project Technical Support – III: Three-year graduate degree in a relevant subject/field + three years post-qualification experience or PG in a relevant subject/field. Desirable: Research/field work Experience in Public Health or clinical projects, in a government/autonomous/PSU/recognized organization. Knowledge of computer applications. Project Nurse -II: Three-year General Nursing & Midwife (GNM) Course.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for AIIMS Jodhpur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for AIIMS Jodhpur Recruitment 2026 is scheduled to be held on 13th May 2026. Candidates should report at the venue with all required documents well before the scheduled time.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Technical Support – III and Project Nurse -II posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the posts of Project Technical Support – III and Project Nurse -II in AIIMS Jodhpur Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Project Technical Support – III?
faq.answer: For the Project Technical Support – III post, candidates need a three-year graduate degree in a relevant subject/field with three years of post-qualification experience or a PG degree in a relevant subject/field. Desirable qualifications include research experience and computer knowledge.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum qualification for the Project Nurse -II position?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the Project Nurse -II position is a three-year General Nursing & Midwife (GNM) Course.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the AIIMS Jodhpur recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts under this recruitment is 30 years. Age relaxation may be provided for experienced individuals on a case-to-case basis.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary ranging from Rs. 24,000 to Rs. 33,600 per month, depending on the post and their qualifications/experience.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for AIIMS Jodhpur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection of candidates for these posts will be based on a Walk-in Interview conducted by AIIMS Jodhpur.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Jodhpur, Rajasthan. The exact venue details will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.answer: The walk-in interview for AIIMS Jodhpur Recruitment 2026 is scheduled to be held on 13th May 2026. Candidates should report at the venue with all required documents well before the scheduled time.
